entries.title: Design Intern
entries.subtitle: TYPEONE · London, UK
entries.description: Designed and deployed an immersive 3D-mapped environment for a featured museum exhibit. Used TouchDesigner for visual programming, spatial alignment, and large-scale projection hardware.

entries.title: BSc Games Design & Development
entries.subtitle: University of Greenwich
entries.description: Combined software engineering with player-centric design in Unity and C#—gameplay systems, editor tooling, and jam/capstone work. Extended into multiplayer client–server architecture, AWS-hosted dedicated servers, and VR (spatial UI, motion controls, performance). Class representative in first year.
